# rubrik_sla_source_cluster (Data Source)

The `rubrik_sla_source_cluster` data source is used to access information about
an SLA source cluster in RSC. A source cluster is looked up using the cluster name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up SLA source cluster by name.
data "rubrik_sla_source_cluster" "cluster" {
  name = "my-cluster"
}

output "cluster_id" {
  value = data.rubrik_sla_source_cluster.cluster.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Cluster name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Cluster ID (UUID).
- `version` (String) Cluster version.
